form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Last start 6th (Fr1) over 2040m at this track, beaten 40 m by Mysticalfantasy (2:29.90) in 4yo+ NR up to 40 on April 9 at $51. The run previous 5th (Fr1) over 1780m at this track beaten 20 m by Belmer Betty (2:11.00) in 4yo+ NR up to 40 on April 2 at $41. Has the inside draw which may spark a revival.

form.formComment: Recent form below what he is capable of. Last start 6th (Sr1) over 1780m at this track, beaten 20 m by Belmer Betty (2:11.00) in 4yo+ NR up to 40 on April 2 at $10. The start before 9th (Sr1) over 1660m at Albion Park, beaten 35 m by Victree Charlie (2:00.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 45 on March 27 at $23. Certainly worth another chance.
